title: melissa flava
intro: Melissa flava, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include calming effects, anti-inflammatory properties, and antimicrobial actions. The health benefits of lemon balm include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Melissa flava can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
